title: An Act to Reauthorize Funding of Collective Bargaining Agreements with Executive Branch Employees
last_house_action: 4/14/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/14/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on Appropriations and Financial Affairs suggested and ordered printed. Under suspension of the rules and WITHOUT REFERENCE to a Committee, the Bill was READ ONCE . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . On motion of Representative GATTINE of Westbrook, House Amendment "A" (H-1069) was READ and ADOPTED . Subsequently, the Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-1069) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

FIRST READING without reference to a Committee Under suspension of the Rules, Bill READ TWICE. House Amendment "A" (H-1069) READ and ADOPTED. PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY House Amendment "A" (H-1069) without reference to a Committee in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
